name: OpenYurt
description: Alibabas open-source edge-native Kubernetes extension; CNCF Sandbox project for cloud-edge computing.

seo.title: OpenYurt — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: OpenYurt: Alibabas open-source edge-native Kubernetes extension; CNCF Sandbox project for cloud-edge computing.

when_to_use: Extending Kubernetes to manage edge nodes from a cloud control plane
Cloud-edge computing with Kubernetes-native edge node lifecycle
Managing IoT gateways as Kubernetes worker nodes
Edge-native K8s extension for factory and retail edge compute
CNCF-compliant cloud-edge computing for Alibaba Cloud apps

pros: Extends Kubernetes to edge with minimal changes
OTA and node pool management included
cons: Operational complexity on top of plain K8s
review.verdict: Promising edge Kubernetes extension for teams already deep in K8s, still earlier stage than KubeEdge in adoption.
review.best_for: K8s shops extending workloads to edge devices across unstable networks
review.not_for: Production-critical edge deployments needing mature, widely used tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
